title: Blissful Poppy Seed Bliss Balls
description: A sweet and crunchy treat made with poppy seeds and blissful oats, perfect for a healthy snack.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine oats, poppy seeds, and bliss.
In a separate bowl, mix together honey and coconut oil until well combined.
Add vanilla extract to the honey mixture and stir well.
Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and mix until a dough forms.
Cover the dough and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
Once chilled, use a small cookie scoop to form the dough into balls.
Place the balls on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Refrigerate for an additional 30 minutes to set.
